title: 40th Birthday Decorations for Men - Blue and Gold Banner, Balloons, Navy and Gold Latex Party Supplies with Confetti
features: 40th Birthday Decorations: You will get a navy blue triangle flag banner, gold happy 40th birthday banner, 32inch 40 foil balloon, cake topper, 5 pcs navy blue balloons, 5 pcs confetti balloons, 5 pcs gold balloons and ribbons.

Happy 40th Birthday banner: The length of the birthday banner is about 1.5m, and each string banner has 11 pcs triangular flags (15cm*21cm）. The Bunting banner is suitable for 40th birthdays, or anniversary parties.

High-Quality Material: The triangle banners are made of paper material, navy blue, and gold glitter design. The 40-year-old balloon is made of aluminum film, it is recommended to inflate to 85%. The balloon uses high-quality latex that is non-toxic and odorless.

Easy to Assemble: The party balloons support helium or air. The triangle flag needs to be strung together by yourself. And then you can hang these banners on walls, doors, balconies, and windows to decorate your party.

Blue Gold Party Decorations: 40th birthday banner's unique design makes your party more attractive, and suitable for indoor and outdoor, adding atmosphere to your birthday, and letting you and your guests have deep memories.

specifications_table.Included Components: 1 x 5 ft 40th triangle flag banner, 1 x 5ft gold 40th birthday banner, 1x 32 inch 40 birthday balloons, 1 x cake topper, 5 x 12 inch navy blue balloons, 5 x 12 inch gold balloons, 5 x 12 inch confetti balloons, 1 x ribbon
